character_card.name: JAN KOUM
character_card.visual_style: Retrato documental en primer plano a sangre, ocupando el 80% del espacio. Fondo negro profundo. Nombre en cian, gran tamaño. Abundante espacio negativo superior e inferior. Tipografía Satoshi ExtraBold.

thumbnail.headline: De cupones a miles de millones
thumbnail.composition_description: Primer plano de Jan Koum ocupando el 75% de la miniatura, mirando fijamente a cámara. Fondo negro absoluto. Sin elementos distractores.

midjourney_prompts.prompt: Jan Koum, co-founder of WhatsApp, serious expression, intense gaze, framed in a dramatic journalistic portrait, high contrast black and white, deep shadows, shot on 85mm lens, subtle 35mm film grain, editorial magazine style page --ar 16:9

Exterior shot of Soviet-era apartment blocks (Plattenbau), cold, overcast sky, stark atmosphere, with a single vintage Soviet-era telephone booth in the foreground, minimal saturation, high contrast black and white, cinematic documentary style --ar 16:9

midjourney_prompts.purpose: B-roll fotografía Estados Unidos - Asistencia Social
midjourney_prompts.prompt: Interior shot of a bleak, utilitarian government assistance office in 1990s USA, with people queuing, harsh fluorescent lighting, subtle grain, high contrast black and white, documentary realism, evoking struggle and anonymity --ar 16:9

Clean, minimalist composition of two simple speech bubbles in white against a deep black background, conveying direct communication, subtle hint of the cyan accent color (#01C9C7) as a single dividing line, stark, editorial, high contrast --ar 16:9

motion_specs.branding_color_use: El cian (#01C9C7) se utiliza de forma puntual en títulos de transición, como en el texto 'HUMANOS' y el nombre de Jan Koum en la Character Card.
